knownBlockers: Fresh sign-up may be bot-blocked in headless automation -> mark N/A, note it
Stripe billing/subscription flows require Stripe test keys in the target env -> Blocked if unconfigured (SE5-SE10, EX8)
QuickBooks integration requires OAuth config in the target env -> Blocked if unconfigured (I12, SE18-SE20)
Native mobile / PWA install / physical-device checks -> Blocked, no device (X1-X7, EX4)
